message:
fix(web): add missing JargonText to plain text and link content

- DistillationViewer: wrap plain text return in JargonText when no
  formatting tokens are found (line 614)
- RawResponseViewer: wrap link text in JargonText for both valid and
  invalid links so jargon terms in link text get tooltips
- Fix .ts import extension in check-jargon-health.ts script
